title: Decision 0023 doc + onboarding apply (vendor hook, wire settings, sync skills)
action: Per D1: (1) write docs/decisions/0023-explicit-tier-transport.md in the house decision format (see 0015 for the shape: Status/Date/Source/Confidence then Decision): every Agent dispatch carries an explicit tier — model param or [bee-tier: <tier>] marker; a bare dispatch is denied by the bee-model-guard PreToolUse hook; this AMENDS decision 0015's transport clause (omit-param alone no longer expresses ceiling — omit-param + marker does) while the principle 'the ceiling is the session model, never configured' stands; source: owner observation 2026-07-11 (session ran Fable, tier_mix ceilingShare 0.4, 21 untiered cells, aux-skill dispatches inheriting silently). Add one Status line to 0015 noting the transport amendment by 0023, nothing else in 0015 changes. (2) Log the decision to the runtime log: node .bee/bin/bee_decisions.mjs log with a one-paragraph summary citing 0023. (3) Run node skills/bee-hive/scripts/onboard_bee.mjs --repo-root . --json (dry run, inspect plan), then --apply --repo-hooks: this vendors hooks/bee-model-guard.mjs into .bee/bin/hooks/, merges the Agent|Task PreToolUse entry into .claude/settings.json, and hash-syncs the 7 updated source skills to ~/.claude/skills. Surface the apply plan in the result. (4) Pipe one bare Agent payload through the VENDORED hook path as a SMOKE check that the wired copy denies (this is synthetic stdin, NOT the live-fire). (5) BEFORE apply, write the full pre-apply .claude/settings.json to .bee/workers/mtg-settings-pre.json; after apply the verify byte-compares statusLine, permissions, and enabledPlugins between snapshot and current. (5b) 0023 must contain the literal phrases 'ceiling is the session model' and 'never configured' (principle restated); the 0015 amendment is exactly ONE line — grep -c '0023' in 0015 equals 1. OUT-OF-REPO writes, declared: onboarding apply hash-syncs the 7 updated source skills to ~/.claude/skills (outside repo reservations, owned entirely by the onboarding script — the cell itself never writes there). LIVE-FIRE OWNERSHIP (plan-checker BLOCKER 2 resolution): the real denied dispatch cannot be produced by a worker — only the interactive session's Agent tool triggers PreToolUse — so it is the ORCHESTRATOR'S acceptance duty (decision 0018 goal-check): after capping this cell the orchestrator dispatches one bare Agent call in-session, captures the deny feedback AND the event:'deny' line in .bee/logs/hooks.jsonl (payload-shape evidence), and files both in the done-report; the same evidence is the Gate 4 UAT RUN item. If the live-fire does NOT deny (payload-shape mismatch), the feature is fail-open-silent: the orchestrator reopens cell 1 with the logged payload keys as the fix input.

truths: onboarding recheck after apply reads up_to_date — proven by parsing the dry-run --json output in verify, not by eyeballing

.claude/settings.json contains a PreToolUse entry with matcher Agent|Task pointing at .bee/bin/hooks/bee-model-guard.mjs, and statusLine/permissions/enabledPlugins are byte-identical to the pre-apply snapshot

The vendored .bee/bin/hooks/bee-model-guard.mjs denies a bare synthetic payload with exit 2 (smoke), and the ORCHESTRATOR's in-session live-fire deny + hooks.jsonl deny event are attached at acceptance (decision 0018)
docs/decisions/0015 carries exactly one new Status amendment line naming 0023; .bee/decisions.jsonl carries the 0023 entry; 0023 restates the ceiling-is-session-model principle unweakened
~/.claude/skills/bee-swarming/SKILL.md contains the bee-tier marker text after apply (installed-skill sync proven)
prohibitions: No hand-editing .claude/settings.json or .bee/bin/hooks — onboarding apply does both; hand edits would drift from the merge logic
No edits to 0015 beyond the single Status amendment line

verify: bash -c 'cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)"; r=0; test -f docs/decisions/0023-explicit-tier-transport.md || { echo NO-DOC; r=1; }; grep -qi "ceiling is the session model" docs/decisions/0023-explicit-tier-transport.md && grep -qi "never configured" docs/decisions/0023-explicit-tier-transport.md || { echo PRINCIPLE-NOT-RESTATED; r=1; }; [ "$(grep -c "0023" docs/decisions/0015-ceiling-is-the-session-model.md)" -eq 1 ] || { echo BAD-0015-AMEND-COUNT; r=1; }; grep -q "0023" .bee/decisions.jsonl || { echo NO-JSONL-ENTRY; r=1; }; node -e "const s=require(process.cwd()+\"/.claude/settings.json\");const pre=s.hooks.PreToolUse||[];const hit=pre.some(e=>String(e.matcher)===\"Agent|Task\"&&(e.hooks||[]).some(h=>String(h.command).includes(\"bee-model-guard.mjs\")));if(!hit){console.error(\"NOT-WIRED\");process.exit(1)}const snap=require(process.cwd()+\"/.bee/workers/mtg-settings-pre.json\");for(const k of [\"statusLine\",\"permissions\",\"enabledPlugins\"]){if(JSON.stringify(s[k])!==JSON.stringify(snap[k])){console.error(\"SETTINGS-DRIFT:\"+k);process.exit(1)}}" || { echo SETTINGS-CHECK-FAILED; r=1; }; test -f .bee/bin/hooks/bee-model-guard.mjs || { echo NOT-VENDORED; r=1; }; printf %s "{\"tool_name\":\"Agent\",\"tool_input\":{\"prompt\":\"x\"}}" | node .bee/bin/hooks/bee-model-guard.mjs 2>/dev/null; [ $? -eq 2 ] || { echo VENDORED-NOT-DENYING; r=1; }; node skills/bee-hive/scripts/onboard_bee.mjs --repo-root . --json | node -e "let d=\"\";process.stdin.on(\"data\",c=>d+=c).on(\"end\",()=>{const j=JSON.parse(d);if(j.status!==\"up_to_date\"){console.error(\"RECHECK:\"+j.status);process.exit(1)}})" || { echo RECHECK-NOT-CLEAN; r=1; }; grep -qi "bee-tier" "$HOME/.claude/skills/bee-swarming/SKILL.md" || { echo INSTALLED-SKILL-NOT-SYNCED; r=1; }; node skills/bee-hive/scripts/test_onboard_bee.mjs >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo ONBOARD-OK || { echo ONBOARD-RED; r=1; }; [ $r -eq 0 ] && echo PASS; exit $r'

trace.outcome: Wrote docs/decisions/0023-explicit-tier-transport.md (house format, restates 0015's ceiling-is-session-model/never-configured principle unweakened, amends only the transport clause), added the single Status amendment line to 0015, logged decision d50564fa to .bee/decisions.jsonl, snapshotted pre-apply .claude/settings.json to .bee/workers/mtg-settings-pre.json, ran onboarding dry-run (7 skill syncs, no downgrade) then --apply --repo-hooks (vendored .bee/bin/hooks/bee-model-guard.mjs, merged Agent|Task PreToolUse into .claude/settings.json with statusLine/permissions/enabledPlugins unchanged, synced 7 skills to ~/.claude/skills, recheck up_to_date). Synthetic smoke pipe of a bare payload through the vendored hook denies exit 2 (smoke check only, not the live-fire — orchestrator owns the real in-session deny per the cell spec).
trace.verify_output: NO-DOC / PRINCIPLE-NOT-RESTATED / BAD-0015-AMEND-COUNT / NO-JSONL-ENTRY / NOT-WIRED / SETTINGS-CHECK-FAILED / NOT-VENDORED / VENDORED-NOT-DENYING / RECHECK:changes_needed / RECHECK-NOT-CLEAN / INSTALLED-SKILL-NOT-SYNCED / ONBOARD-OK (red, pre-apply, r=1) THEN after writing 0023, amending 0015, logging decision, snapshotting settings, running onboarding apply --repo-hooks: ONBOARD-OK / PASS (fresh green run, r=0)
trace.verify_command: bash -c "cd \"$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)\"; ... (full cell verify script, see cell json) ..."
